description: First-class refusal outcome. RefusalResult extends ComponentResult (src/shared/component_primitive.py) and is the constitutional representation of an explicit refusal — not a technical failure. This contract governs only the fields declared directly in RefusalResult; inherited ComponentResult fields (component_id, ok, data, phase, confidence) are governed by the ComponentResult contract (Wave 1, Session 2). Runtime invariants enforced by __post_init__: ok must be False, reason must be non-empty (refusals without explanation violate constitutional transparency), refusal_type must be in the governed vocabulary. Governed vocabulary: refusal_type enum in .intent/META/enums.json (ADR-056 D5): boundary, confidence, contradiction, assumption, capability, extraction, quality, unspecified. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1.

reason.description: Constitutional reason for refusal. Must cite the policy or rule being enforced. Non-empty invariant enforced by __post_init__.

suggested_action.description: What the caller should do instead. Default empty string; populated by factory class methods (boundary_violation, low_confidence, extraction_failed, quality_threshold).

refusal_type.description: Category of refusal for tracking and analysis. Default 'unspecified'. Governed vocabulary: refusal_type enum in .intent/META/enums.json. Values: boundary, confidence, contradiction, assumption, capability, extraction, quality, unspecified.

original_request.description: The request that was refused, recorded for audit trail. Default empty string.
